title: Product-to-Sum Identity
text: Recall the product-to-sum identity for two cosine functions: \cos(A)\cos(B) $$=$$ $$\frac{1}{2}$$ $$(\cos(A-B)$$ + \cos(A+B)).

title: Identify $A$ and $B$. Calculate their sum and difference.
text: Determine the arguments for the sum and difference of the angles.

title: Form the Final Expression
text: Substitute the calculated values into the product-to-sum formula.
